reviews.comment:
Un clásico.  5mentarios ah podrían vender gas envasado están muy cerca familias que las consumen . No todo es para vehículos muchachos también hay  quienes pueden ser buenos clientes .

(Translated by Google)
A classic. 5 comments. Oh, they could sell bottled gas; they're very close to families who use it. It's not all about vehicles, guys; there are also people who could be good customers.
